'''ât-ng-n''' ('''katangan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:life|life]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-ng-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:life|life]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-ng-n
|-
! Lemma
| katangan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitangan|thitangan]] || [[word:jitangan|jitangan]] || [[word:shitangan|shitangan]] || [[word:kitangan|kitangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutangan|thuthutangan]] || [[word:jujutangan|jujutangan]] || [[word:shushutangan|shushutangan]] || [[word:kukutangan|kukutangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutangan|thutangan]] || [[word:jutangan|jutangan]] || [[word:shutangan|shutangan]] || [[word:kutangan|kutangan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutangan|thutangan]] || [[word:jutangan|jutangan]] || [[word:shutangan|shutangan]] || [[word:kutangan|kutangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetangan|thetangan]] || [[word:jetangan|jetangan]] || [[word:shetangan|shetangan]] || [[word:ketangan|ketangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotangan|thothotangan]] || [[word:jojotangan|jojotangan]] || [[word:shoshotangan|shoshotangan]] || [[word:kokotangan|kokotangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotangan|thotangan]] || [[word:jotangan|jotangan]] || [[word:shotangan|shotangan]] || [[word:kotangan|kotangan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotangan|thotangan]] || [[word:jotangan|jotangan]] || [[word:shotangan|shotangan]] || [[word:kotangan|kotangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtangan|thĂŠtangan]] || [[word:jĂŠtangan|jĂŠtangan]] || [[word:shĂŠtangan|shĂŠtangan]] || [[word:kĂŠtangan|kĂŠtangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatangan|thathatangan]] || [[word:jajatangan|jajatangan]] || [[word:shashatangan|shashatangan]] || [[word:kakatangan|kakatangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatangan|thatangan]] || [[word:jatangan|jatangan]] || [[word:shatangan|shatangan]] || [[word:katangan|katangan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatangan|thatangan]] || [[word:jatangan|jatangan]] || [[word:shatangan|shatangan]] || [[word:katangan|katangan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatangan|shatangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatangan|goshatangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatangan|gokishatangan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatanganĂŒ|shatanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatanganknĂŒ|goshatanganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanganĂŒ|gokishatanganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatanganshĂ«|shatanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatangankshĂ«|goshatangankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatanganshĂ«|gokishatanganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanganro|shatanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatangankro|goshatangankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanganro|gokishatanganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanganmu|shatanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatangankmu|goshatangankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanganmu|gokishatanganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatangansher|shatangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatanganksher|goshatanganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatangansher|gokishatangansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatangang|shatangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatangankng|goshatangankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatangang|gokishatangang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatanganya|shatanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatangankya|goshatangankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatanganya|gokishatanganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatanganyam|shatanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatangankyam|goshatangankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatanganyam|gokishatanganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanganĂŒshĂ«|shatanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatanganknĂŒshĂ«|goshatanganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanganĂŒshĂ«|gokishatanganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanganĂŒro|shatanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatanganknĂŒro|goshatanganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanganĂŒro|gokishatanganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanganĂŒmu|shatanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatanganknĂŒmu|goshatanganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanganĂŒmu|gokishatanganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanganshĂ«nĂŒ|shatanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatangankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatangankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatanganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanganshĂ«ro|shatanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatangankshĂ«ro|goshatangankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanganshĂ«ro|gokishatanganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanganshĂ«mu|shatanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatangankshĂ«mu|goshatangankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanganshĂ«mu|gokishatanganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanganronĂŒ|shatanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatangankronĂŒ|goshatangankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanganronĂŒ|gokishatanganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanganroshĂ«|shatanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatangankroshĂ«|goshatangankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanganroshĂ«|gokishatanganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatanganromu|shatanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatangankromu|goshatangankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatanganromu|gokishatanganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatanganmunĂŒ|shatanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatangankmunĂŒ|goshatangankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatanganmunĂŒ|gokishatanganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatanganmushĂ«|shatanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatangankmushĂ«|goshatangankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatanganmushĂ«|gokishatanganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatanganmuro|shatanganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatangankmuro|goshatangankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatanganmuro|gokishatanganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
